data.body: LANDING STATE (handoff): remediation COMPLETE+VALIDATED — epic gnu-whale-ichor CLOSED+SIGNED (completion-verifier, all 10 ACs), all 7 stories closed. 8-change stack (558/560/561/563/576/579/580/581) rebased onto main d052883015 (now STABLE — auto-lander queue drained), validated GREEN locally (makefull4: 5798 passed, only known resolve_symbol flake). All 3 concurrent interactions fixed (secret-detector fixture assembled-at-runtime; gen_cli _LADDER +verify-identity/authorship; authorship_ledger stripped in compact _semantic normalizers). Diverged-design changes REPLACED. Landing stuck earlier on: FFO churn (main advanced 02d4->d052 via auto-lander) + copied Verified-1 across no-op patchsets + flaky macOS default-suite. RESOLUTION IN PROGRESS: main stable, rechecked all 8 to force fresh CI on validated tree; awaiting all-green -> submit top 581 (lands all 8 atomically, Submitted-Together). If flakes recur: recheck (plain keyword). If won't converge: consider Autosubmit delegation to auto-lander. NEXT ACTION: on all-8-green + main-stable, POST /a/changes/581/submit as RebarBotNava.
